login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Log into your account to access the marketplace

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to receive a recovery link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If the email {email} is registered, you will receive a link to reset your password shortly.

home.subtitle: Browse active offers from the best breeders in the country. 100% secure platform with delivery guarantee.
home.noListingsDesc: Breeders haven't posted new birds today.
home.availableBirdsSubtitle: Explore our collection of the best birds from the best selected sellers. Find the perfect canary for you.

categories.title: Our Categories
categories.subtitle: Find the right category for the canary you are looking for.
categories.sizeCanaryDesc: Birds selected for body structure, proportions and elegance. Ideal for exhibitors and high-standard breeders.
categories.colorCanaryDesc: Specimens with rare genetic mutations and vibrant coloring. A living palette of unique and striking tones.
categories.singCanaryDesc: Birds with refined melody and distinctive vocal technique. For those who appreciate the harmonious song of canaries.

topSellers.title: Top Sellers
topSellers.subtitle: The highest-rated breeders with the most sales on the platform.
topSellers.disclaimer: Data updated monthly. Ranking based on sales and buyer reviews.

sponsored.title: Sponsored Space
sponsored.subtitle: Meet our partners who value aviculture and are here to support you.
sponsored.label: Sponsored

sponsor1.description: Partner vet clinics specialized in birds. Book your consultation online and ensure your canary's health.

sponsor2.description: Climate-controlled fleet, real-time tracking, and insurance included. The safest way to transport your birds across the country.

sponsor3.description: Feed and supplements developed by animal nutrition experts focused on the performance and plumage of your canaries.

birdsSearch.title: Bird Collection
birdsSearch.subtitle: Browse our entire catalog of authentic animals and find exactly what you are looking for.
birdsSearch.emptyDesc: Try adjusting your filters or making a new search to find what you are looking for.

footer.description: The ultimate platform for bird breeders and lovers. Buy and sell safely with expert support.
footer.protectedDesc: Your order money is safe until the bird delivery is confirmed.

raffles.title: Bird Raffles
raffles.description: Soon you'll be able to join exclusive raffles for rare and high-value birds. A fun and affordable way to get your next feathered companion!

auctions.title: Bird Auctions
auctions.description: Auctions are coming soon! Compete with other breeders for exceptional birds in real time, with bids that reflect the best specimens.

batches.title: Bird Batches
batches.description: Buy multiple birds in special batches with even better prices. Ideal for breeders looking to expand their flock efficiently.

hero.subtitle: Connect with breeders and buyers who need to transport birds with care and responsibility. Expand your routes, build loyal customers, and be recognized as a specialist in animal transportation.

benefits.title: Partnership Benefits
benefits.subtitle: Be part of a network that values safe and responsible transportation of ornamental birds.

demand.title: Consistent Demand
demand.desc: Access an active base of breeders and buyers who regularly need specialized freight for birds.

trust.title: Verified Credential
trust.desc: Your profile goes through validation. Clients know they're hiring a carrier approved by the platform.

routes.title: New Routes and Regions
routes.desc: Discover opportunities on routes you already cover and expand into regions with high demand for bird transport.

ratings.title: Reputation and Ratings
ratings.desc: Every successful delivery builds your reputation. Positive ratings attract more clients and increase your visibility.

steps.title: Your Path to Partnership
steps.subtitle: Simple and straightforward process. From registration to your first trip in just a few days.

apply.title: Sign Up
apply.desc: Fill out the form with your details and information about your fleet.

review.title: Review
review.desc: Our team evaluates your profile and documentation within 3 business days.

approved.title: Approved
approved.desc: You receive confirmation and your profile becomes available to receive requests.

active.title: Start Delivering
active.desc: Accept freight requests and build your reputation on the platform.

form.title: Request Your Partnership
form.subtitle: Fill out the form and our team will get back to you within 3 business days.
form.routesPlaceholder: Ex: Northeast corridor, Pacific coast, nationwide...
form.docFormats: PNG, JPG, WEBP or PDF · Max. 10MB
form.notesPlaceholder: Transport conditions, available equipment, route restrictions...
form.successDesc: We received your information. Our team will review your profile and get back to you within 3 business days.

hero.subtitle: Connect with ornamental bird owners and breeders looking for a trusted professional. Grow your client base and build your reputation as an avian care specialist.

benefits.title: Partnership Benefits
benefits.subtitle: Be part of a network that values the health and well-being of birds.

reach.title: Reach New Clients
reach.desc: Expose your work to thousands of active breeders who need specialized avian veterinary guidance.

trust.title: Credibility and Visibility
trust.desc: Your verified profile builds trust. Users know they're talking to a licensed professional.

grow.title: Grow Your Practice
grow.desc: Consultations, telehealth and referrals. A consistent source of new patients from people who truly love birds.

referral.title: Referral Network
referral.desc: Platform members recommend partner vets to each other, generating an organic flow of referrals.

steps.title: Your Path to Partnership
steps.subtitle: Simple and fast process. From sign-up to approval in just a few days.

apply.title: Sign Up
apply.desc: Fill out the form with your personal details and professional credentials.

review.title: Review
review.desc: Our team evaluates your profile and verifies your license within 3 business days.

approved.title: Approved
approved.desc: You receive confirmation and your profile becomes visible on the platform.

active.title: Start Seeing Patients
active.desc: Receive contacts from breeders and bird owners directly through the marketplace.

form.title: Request Your Partnership
form.subtitle: Fill out the form and our team will get back to you within 3 business days.
form.specialtiesPlaceholder: Ex: Canaries, parrots, exotic birds, avian surgery...
form.notesPlaceholder: Office hours, telehealth availability, other relevant details...
form.successDesc: We received your information. Our team will review your profile and get back to you within 3 business days.

hero.subtitle: Connect your business to Brazil's largest canary marketplace. Reach a passionate and engaged audience ready to discover what you offer.

advantages.title: Benefits of Being a Sponsor
advantages.subtitle: Your brand alongside those who most understand and love the world of birds.

brand.title: Highlight Your Brand
brand.desc: Position your company in high-visibility spaces on the platform, ensuring exposure to thousands of active users.

sales.title: Increase Your Sales
sales.desc: Reach qualified buyers and breeders who are actively searching for bird-related products and services.

reach.title: Reach Thousands
reach.desc: Our audience grows every day. Your ad is shown to a highly segmented and engaged public.

speed.title: Fast Activation
speed.desc: From contract to publication in up to 48h. Simple process, no red tape, with dedicated support throughout the partnership.

plans.title: Sponsorship Plans
plans.subtitle: Choose the ideal duration and start being seen by the right audience.

month1.name: 1 Month
month1.desc: Take the first step. Put your brand in front of passionate breeders and buyers and see what happens.

month3.name: 3 Months
month3.desc: 3 months is just enough time to build recognition. Your brand starts feeling familiar to the people who matter most.

month6.name: 6 Months
month6.desc: With half a year of presence, you become a go-to name. Plus, you save R$200 compared to going month by month.

year1.name: 1 Year
year1.desc: The plan for those who want to be unforgettable. Always on, all year long, and R$600 less in your pocket.

form.title: Request Your Sponsorship
form.subtitle: Fill out the form with your details and ad content. Our team will get back to you within 24h.
form.adTitlePlaceholder: Ex: AveVet Clinics — Health for Birds
form.adDescPlaceholder: Describe what you offer, your differentials, and why visitors should click on your ad.
form.adImageFormats: PNG, JPG, WEBP or SVG · Max. 5MB
form.adNotesPlaceholder: Additional information, placement preferences, or any important details...
form.successDesc: We received your contact. Our team will review your request and get back to you within 24 hours.

listingDetails.guarantee: 100% secure purchase. Payment is only transferred to the seller after confirmation of receipt of the bird.
listingDetails.reviewBeforePayment: You will be able to review the order before payment.

checkout.errorLoading: Could not load the selected offer.
checkout.errorProcess: An error occurred while processing your order. Please try again.
checkout.title: Order Review
checkout.deliveryDesc: Logistical details will be arranged with the seller after payment confirmation.
checkout.guaranteeDesc: Your money is protected. In case of problems with the animal, the amount is fully refunded (Idempotency and MVP Guarantee).

unauthenticated.title: Sign in to view your favorites
unauthenticated.desc: Create an account or sign in to save your favorite listings and access them later.

empty.title: You have no favorites yet
empty.desc: Explore the marketplace and click the heart on the listings you like the most to save them here.

orders.title: My Orders
orders.description: Track your purchases and transaction history.
orders.emptyDesc: You haven't made any purchases on the platform yet.

listings.title: My Listings
listings.description: Manage the birds you have listed for sale.
listings.emptyDesc: You haven't listed any birds for sale yet.

actions.activateDesc: This listing will become public and visible to all buyers in the marketplace.
actions.pauseDesc: The listing will no longer appear in the showcase. You can reactivate it later.
actions.cancelDesc: Are you sure you want to cancel this listing? This action cannot be undone.
actions.error: An error occurred while updating the listing.

editListing.title: Edit Listing
editListing.description: Update the selling price and other alterable features of the listing.

errors.notEditable: Only Paused or Draft listings can be edited.
errors.noPermission: You do not have permission to edit this listing.

createListing.title: Create New Listing
createListing.description: Fill in the bird's details and price to publish it on the marketplace.
createListing.error: Error creating listing. Please check the data and try again.

profile.description: View and update your account information.

form.title: Create your Password
form.subtitle: Your partnership was approved. Set your access password below.

success.title: Password saved successfully!
success.desc: Your account is now active. You can now log into the platform using your email and the newly created password.

error.missingTokenDesc: The setup link you used does not have a valid token or has expired. Check your email or contact support.
error.passwordLength: The password must be at least 6 characters long.
error.generic: An unexpected error occurred while setting your password.

dashboard.welcome: Welcome to the administrative panel. Select an option from the sidebar to manage platform entities.
dashboard.pendingUsersDesc: Manage logistics and veterinary partners waiting for approval in the Users tab.
